case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. FRANKLIN RAFAEL CONTRERAS DIAZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-30-2019 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO JUL-03-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
